hero.headline:
Here to help
you organize
your vision.
hero.body: The premium workspace for moodboards, style guides, and creative inspiration. Built for designers who care about every detail.

collage.title: Rose & Azure Mood
collage.noteBody: Soft rose tones meet cool azure — delicate, dreamy, character-driven.

design.label: Design
design.title: Infinity Canvas
design.desc: A limitless space to organize your thoughts and assets.

ai.label: AI Powered
ai.title: Smart Suggestions
ai.desc: Intelligent color and tag generation for your projects.

collab.label: Collaboration
collab.title: Real-time Sync
collab.desc: Work together with your team seamlessly, anywhere.

canvas.title: Unleash Your Creativity on an Infinite Canvas
canvas.desc: Stop worrying about borders. Our infinite canvas allows you to drag, drop, and arrange assets exactly how you see them in your mind. From high-res photography to delicate fabric swatches, Winxi handles it all with grace.

ai.title: Smart Suggestions for Faster Workflows
ai.desc: Upload an image and let Winxi do the heavy lifting. Our AI extracts color palettes, suggests relevant tags, and even identifies font families, so you can focus on the artistic direction.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Winxi supports all major image formats (PNG, JPG, WebP), SVGs, and even color HEX codes. We're working on video and FIGMA integration.
faq.q2: Is Winxi free for open source?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Winxi is built by creators, for creators. Our core workspace will always remain free for individual contributors and open-source projects.

github.title: Built by the community, for the community
github.desc: Winxi is an open-source project. We believe the future of creative tools should be transparent and collaborative. Whether you are a developer, designer, or enthusiast, we would love your help.

finalCta.headline: Ready to organize your vision?
finalCta.subheadline: Join thousands of designers building the future of moodboards.
